message:
chore(deps): replace git-pinned franken-kernel with crates.io v0.3.0

franken-kernel was previously pulled at git rev bda8035a
(~2000 commits behind HEAD) from the asupersync repo. Since the
v0.3.0 release of the asupersync workspace — which includes
franken-kernel as a published member — the same crate is now available
on crates.io, eliminating the git pin and bringing in all the intervening
kernel improvements.

- Cargo.toml: `franken-kernel = { git =
  "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git",
  rev = "bda8035a6e07ce7343f0241cc878bd84174c16f4",
  package = "franken-kernel" }` → `franken-kernel = "0.3.0"`.
  (The other git-pinned fnx-* crates stay — they track the sibling
  franken_networkx repo, not asupersync, and bump independently.)
- Cargo.lock: refreshed via `cargo update` to resolve franken-kernel
  from the crates.io source at v0.3.0.
